glosses.ja: シーン; シーン（サブカルチャー）

sentences.target: Es gab eine Szene im Bus.

translations.de: Es gab eine Szene im Bus.
translations.en: There was a scene on the bus.
translations.es: Se armó un escándalo en el autobús.
translations.fr: Il y a eu une scène dans le bus.
translations.vi: Trên xe buýt đã xảy ra một chuyện ầm ĩ.
translations.nl: Er was gedoe in de bus.
translations.ja: バスの中で騒ぎが起きた。

tokens.explanation: Expletive/dummy subject in an existential construction (Es gab ... = there was/were); does not refer to a concrete entity.
Preterite, 3rd person singular of 'geben'; used existentially with 'es' to present existence; selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Szene'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'gab'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase and governs the dative.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: In der Szene kennt ihn fast jeder.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈt͡seːnə kɛnt iːn fast ˈjeːdɐ./

translations.de: In der Szene kennt ihn fast jeder.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈt͡seːnə kɛnt iːn fast ˈjeːdɐ./
translations.en: In that scene, almost everyone knows him.
translations.es: En ese mundillo casi todos lo conocen.
translations.fr: Dans ce milieu, presque tout le monde le connaît.
translations.it: In quell'ambiente lo conoscono quasi tutti.
translations.ko: 그쪽 음악계에서는 그를 모르는 사람이 거의 없다.
translations.zh-Hans: 在那个圈子里，几乎人人都认识他。
translations.yue: 喺嗰個圈子，差唔多人人都識佢。
translations.ru: В той тусовке его почти все знают.
translations.pt: Naquele meio, quase todos o conhecem.
translations.he: באותו חוג כמעט כולם מכירים אותו.
translations.tr: O çevrede onu neredeyse herkes tanır.
translations.vi: Trong giới đó, hầu như ai cũng biết anh ấy.
translations.ar: في ذلك الوسط يعرفه تقريبًا الجميع.
translations.nl: In dat wereldje kent bijna iedereen hem.
translations.uk: У тій тусовці його знає майже кожен.
translations.hu: Abban a körben szinte mindenki ismeri őt.
translations.hi: उस दायरे में उसे लगभग हर कोई जानता है।
translations.pl: W tym środowisku zna go prawie każdy.
translations.el: Σε εκείνον τον κύκλο τον ξέρουν σχεδόν όλοι.
translations.nb: I det miljøet kjenner nesten alle ham.
translations.id: Di kalangan itu, hampir semua orang mengenalnya.
translations.sv: I den kretsen känner nästan alla honom.
translations.ro: În cercul acela, aproape toți îl cunosc.
translations.cs: V tom prostředí ho zná skoro každý.
translations.da: I det miljø kender næsten alle ham.
translations.fi: Siinä piirissä melkein kaikki tuntevat hänet.
translations.ja: その界隈では、彼のことをほとんどの人が知っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative phrase; here with static meaning, thus governing the dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Szene'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of 'in'; here meaning a milieu/community.
Present, 3rd person singular; main verb taking an accusative object ('ihn').
Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'kennt'.
Degree adverb modifying 'jeder' (extent: nearly all).
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the subject; nominative singular (generic).

sentences.target: Du machst jetzt bitte keine Szene.

translations.de: Du machst jetzt bitte keine Szene.
translations.en: Please don't make a scene now.
translations.es: Por favor, no montes una escena ahora.
translations.fr: S'il te plaît, ne fais pas de scène maintenant.
translations.it: Per favore, adesso non fare una scenata.
translations.pt: Por favor, não faça uma cena agora.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đừng làm ầm lên bây giờ.
translations.ar: من فضلك لا تفتعل مشكلة الآن.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, зараз не влаштовуй сцену.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, μην κάνεις τώρα σκηνή.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, ikke lag en scene nå.
translations.sv: Snälla, ställ inte till en scen nu.
translations.ro: Te rog, nu face o scenă acum.
translations.da: Vær sød ikke at lave en scène nu.
translations.fi: Ole kiltti, älä nyt tee kohtausta.
translations.ja: お願いだから、今は騒ぎを起こさないで。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Present, 2nd person singular; main verb. In the idiom 'eine/keine Szene machen' = to make a scene.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy/present time.
Politeness marker/discourse interjection; softens the directive; not an argument of the verb.
Negative determiner, feminine singular accusative; negates the noun phrase 'Szene'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the complement of 'machst' in the set phrase.

sentences.target: Das war eine seltsame Szene im Supermarkt.
sentences.reading: /das vaːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈzɛltsamə ˈt͡seːnə ɪm ˈzuːpɐmaʁkt./

translations.de: Das war eine seltsame Szene im Supermarkt.
translations.ipa: /das vaːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈzɛltsamə ˈt͡seːnə ɪm ˈzuːpɐmaʁkt./
translations.en: That was a strange scene at the supermarket.
translations.es: Fue una situación rara en el supermercado.
translations.fr: C'était une scène étrange au supermarché.
translations.it: È stata una scena strana al supermercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 超市里发生了一件奇怪的事。
translations.pt: Foi uma situação estranha no supermercado.
translations.vi: Đó là một chuyện kỳ lạ ở siêu thị.
translations.nl: Dat was een rare situatie in de supermarkt.
translations.hi: सुपरमार्केट में वह एक अजीब घटना थी।
translations.pl: To była dziwna sytuacja w supermarkecie.
translations.el: Ήταν μια περίεργη σκηνή στο σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.nb: Det var en merkelig situasjon i supermarkedet.
translations.id: Itu adalah kejadian aneh di supermarket.
translations.sv: Det var en märklig situation i mataffären.
translations.ro: A fost o situație ciudată la supermarket.
translations.cs: V supermarketu se stala zvláštní scéna.
translations.da: Det var en mærkelig situation i supermarkedet.
translations.ja: それはスーパーで変な出来事だった。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun used as subject, referring to a prior event/situation; nominative singular neuter.
Preterite, 3rd person singular of the copula 'sein'; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner within the predicate noun phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Szene'; agrees in nominative feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular as the predicate noun after 'war'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase, governs the dative.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of 'im'.
